title: rubus hirtus var. richterianus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. richterianus, also known as the Raspberry Bramble, is a variety of the Raspberry plant that is native to the mountains of Europe. It is a type of bramble with medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The leaves and roots of Rubus hirtus var. richterianus can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to treat digestive issues, sore throats, and other health problems.
